general_ui_ux_design_guidelines: Benchmark against world's top developers (Sobha, Lodha, Six Senses). Must feel crore-plus, cinematic, obsessively crafted, never templated.
Non-negotiables: deep obsidian black + champagne/metallic gold theme. Restrained, editorial with lots of negative space.
Use buttery-smooth momentum scrolling (Lenis) and cinematic scroll-driven storytelling.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
NEVER use complete transparent background in header, overlays, or surfaces with content underneath it.
Gold is an accent, not a flood. Obsidian + negative space carry the elegance.

spacing_and_rhythm.philosophy: Restraint = luxury. Massive negative space around key elements. 2-3x more padding than standard designs.
spacing_and_rhythm.containers: Max-width 1440px with generous side margins (px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24).
spacing_and_rhythm.vertical_rhythm: py-24 md:py-32 or py-40 for major sections.

visual_enhancers.borders: Hairline gold dividers (1px solid #8A6D2F or #C9A24B opacity-30).
visual_enhancers.section_numbers: Small uppercase section index numbers (01/02/03) using Jost, wide tracking.
visual_enhancers.shimmer: Subtle shimmer effect on headlines using background-clip: text with animated background-position.

motion.text_reveal: Line-by-line clip-up reveals with slight blur-in.
motion.image_reveal: Clip-path wipe or scale 1.08 -> 1 on scroll.
motion.hover_states: Gold underline draw + magnetic pull on hover.
motion.cursor: Custom cursor: gold dot + trailing ring (moves with slight delay).

navigation.style: Global nav. Transparent over hero, frosted (backdrop-blur-md bg-obsidian/70) on scroll. Hairline bottom border on scroll.
navigation.links: Jost, uppercase, wide tracking, hover: gold underline draw.

buttons.primary: Pill or sharp. Obsidian background with gold-foil border or gold text. Magnetic pull effect on hover.
buttons.secondary: Text only with gold underline draw on hover.

cards.style: Borderless or hairline gold border. Image reveal on hover (scale up). Dark obsidian backgrounds.
cards.content: Negative space inside cards. P-8 or P-12.

forms.style: Minimalist. Floating labels, hairline bottom border inputs. No standard boxes.
forms.states: Focus: bright gold border. Success state: gold glow/check.

chatbot_widget.style: Floating widget, bottom right. Dark theme with gold accents.
chatbot_widget.icon: Custom AI icon (no generic emojis), pulsing gold ring.

preloader.animation: Animated brand wordmark reveal. Progress bar in gold-foil gradient.

interactive_master_plan.style: Night-aerial master layout plan image. SVG overlay for plots.
interactive_master_plan.interactivity: Hover plot highlights. Tooltips with plot details. Available/Sold toggle.

Home: Cinematic preloader -> Full-screen hero video background with gold-foil headline.
Brand statement pull-quote reveal (Cormorant Garamond, italic).
The View flagship spotlight teaser with animated counters.
Stats band (animated counters for acres, plots, etc).
Projects preview 3-up grid with clip-path image reveals.
Contact CTA band with lead form.
About_Us: Hero with scale-model hill image or architectural abstract.
Scroll-animated vertical timeline of Parvathi Infra.
Projects: Large imagery, minimal text. Hover to reveal details.
The_View: Hero video (drone/model MP4) with overture stats.
Cinematic scroll-scrubbed drone flythrough with pinned parallax and gold captions.
Swappable VideoSlot player for grand entrance full-bleed.
Interactive Master Plan (hover plot highlights, tooltips, available/sold toggle).
Amenities editorial masonry/horizontal-scroll gallery (clubhouse, arch, amphitheatre - use premium stand-in images with gold-on-black placeholder frame treatment).
Location & connectivity with Google Map embed + animated drive-time counters.
Gallery: Lightbox grid with category filters (Exteriors, Interiors, Amenities).
Contact: Split layout: Left form (minimalist), Right Map & contact details (WhatsApp, address).
Sticky enquiry bar and floating WhatsApp button with gold ring pulse.

image_urls.description: Modern luxury villa at dusk with illuminated pool. Use for Home hero fallback or Projects grid.
Luxury pool and patio area at night. Use for amenities or Gallery.
Spacious living room featuring luxurious decor. Use as premium stand-in for clubhouse.
Luxurious modern bar counter. Use for amenities.
Minimalist concrete architecture. Use for About Us background or editorial sections.
Picturesque view of bright sundown sky over vast mountainous area. Use for Location & Connectivity section.

media.stand_in_guidance: For missing renders (clubhouse, arch, amphitheatre), use the provided premium stock imagery framed with a delicate gold border on an obsidian background. Add a small 'Artist Impression' micro-label in Jost.

3d_libraries_and_tools: framer-motion: For line-by-line clip-up text reveals, scroll animations, image reveals, and page transitions.
lucide-react: For crisp, minimal icons (styled with gold accents).
react-use: For scroll position, window sizing hooks.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Always use 'data-testid' for all interactive elements.
Do not center-align the main App container. Left-align for human reading flow, center only for specific visual impact (like hero text).
Avoid generic 'AI slop' gradients. Use the specific gold-foil linear-gradient ONLY for highlighted text or borders.
Use glass-morphism (backdrop-blur-md) with #050505/70 for sticky headers and overlapping cards.
Use pill-shaped or sharp buttons based on the defined component rules. Add magnetic pull animation using framer-motion.
For the chatbot, do NOT use robot or brain emojis. Use a minimalist geometric icon or custom SVG in gold.
Component files should be in Javascript (.js or .jsx), not TypeScript.
